title: Test Forest Fire: 122-E01 RESOLVE_FIELD_ROLL_OUTCOME

card.rawText: At the end of your turn, your opponent(s) must roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-3: Opponent(s) primary creature receives 10 damage. 4-6: Destroy this.

plan.title: Test Forest Fire: 122-E01 RESOLVE_FIELD_ROLL_OUTCOME

steps: Create the effect scenario match from this plan.

expectedAssertions.label: Source card exists in the generated match catalog.
